overall.description: Dashcam footage from a car driving on a winding mountain road at night during heavy rain. The vehicle navigates multiple curves with active windshield wipers, encounters sparse oncoming traffic, and enters a concrete tunnel toward the end of the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road at night in heavy rain

events.description: oncoming vehicle with bright headlights approaches and passes on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving cautiously on wet winding road with windshield wipers active at moderate speed

metal guardrail running along the right side of the road
rain-soaked asphalt road surface reflecting vehicle headlights
yellow diamond-shaped road sign indicating curve ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a rain-slicked winding mountain road at night, illuminated only by headlights. Metal guardrails line both sides of the narrow road as the car approaches a curve warning sign and encounters an oncoming vehicle passing in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road at night in heavy rain

events.description: second oncoming vehicle with headlights passes on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate curves on the rainy mountain road, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: oncoming car passing by on the left side of the road

entered.detail: dark trees and bushes visible on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The journey continues along the rain-soaked mountain road with guardrails and roadside vegetation visible in the darkness. Another oncoming vehicle passes by as the car approaches the tunnel entrance visible in the distance.

events.description: vehicle enters concrete tunnel, transitioning from outdoor rain to sheltered tunnel environment

agents.ego_description: driving into and through the tunnel, transitioning from outdoor to indoor environment

entered.detail: concrete archway entrance of the road tunnel
smooth concrete wall of tunnel on left side
smooth concrete wall of tunnel on right side

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and enters a concrete tunnel, leaving the rain-exposed mountain road behind. Inside the tunnel, smooth concrete walls replace the metal guardrails, and the environment becomes sheltered from the rain while the windshield wipers continue to clear residual water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a rain-slicked mountain road at night that eventually transitions into the sheltered enclosure of a concrete tunnel. It begins with the vehicle navigating narrow, winding curves illuminated by headlights, passing metal guardrails and a curve warning sign as an oncoming car flashes by. As the journey continues through the darkness, the camera tracks past roadside vegetation and another passing vehicle while the tunnel entrance gradually emerges in the distance. The scene then shifts as the car leaves the rain-exposed mountain pass and enters the tunnel, where smooth concrete walls replace the guardrails. Finally, the environment becomes fully enclosed and sheltered from the storm, though the windshield wipers continue to clear residual water from the glass.
